title: Boolean checks should not be inverted
description: Boolean checks should not be invertedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEpitfallWhy is this an issue?It is needlessly complex to invert the result of a boolean comparison. The opposite comparison should be made instead.Noncompliant code exampleif (!(a === 2)) { ... } // NoncompliantCompliant solutionif (a !== 2) { ..
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Avoid inverting boolean comparisons - use the opposite operator instead.
Avoid inverting function calls - use direct negation instead.
Avoid inverting boolean checks - consider using the opposite condition.
